# circularTemplate

**Instance Property**

The circular template to display.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var circularTemplate: CLKComplicationTemplateGraphicCircular { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **textProvider**: The text to display along the bezel.
